---
title: "first-analysis"
author: "Sophie"
date: "2026-06-09"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Introduction

library("workflowr")

Create a repository 
wflow_start("myproject")

creating website 
wflow_build()

View it on the local machine 
wflow_view()

Publish:
check status 
wflow_status()

wflow_publish(c("analysis/index.Rmd", "analysis/about.Rmd", "analysis/license.Rmd"),
              "Publish the initial files for myproject")
              
              
Connect to Github
wflow_use_github("Sophie-Alice")

Push code to Github:
wflow_git_push(dry_run = TRUE)     or

git push -u origin master


Add a new file 
wflow_open("analysis/first-analysis.Rmd")

```{r}
print("heheheheheheheh")
```
